situational_context: Running comeback day 73 (16 runs completed since May 3). On vacation in Saint-Malo, Bretagne (Jul 12-27) — coastal terrain, GREEN heat conditions (~20°C). Run #16 today: 8.0 km in 58 min, suffer 57 — longest run and highest single-session load of the comeback, significant overshoot of 5 km plan (+60%). ACWR spiked to 1.48 (near 1.50 comeback ceiling). Chronic load building well: 23.7 (+35% since Jun 14). VO2max running improved to 41.7. HRV 7d avg stable at 35 ms. Weight 103.67 kg (stale, single reading Jun 21). Nutrition logging stopped since Jul 9. Vitamin D retest overdue (was due July). No sur-site days this week.

recommendations.text: 48h tissue-tolerance monitoring after Run #16 (8 km, suffer 57) — longest and hardest run of the comeback. Watch for localized Achilles/patellar pain >24h, bony tenderness, unusual morning stiffness. Any pain altering gait → skip Run #17 and substitute with walking. ACWR at 1.48 — no additional running load until Saturday.
recommendations.measurable: Zero localized pain by Friday evening; readiness ≥ 50 on Saturday morning

recommendations.text: Resume nutrition logging — data dark since July 9. TDEE recalibration on Sunday Jul 19 needs ≥3 days of intake data. Without logging, the 95 kg weight objective is flying blind.
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 days logged before Sunday's TDEE recalibration

recommendations.text: Schedule Vitamin D blood draw for week of Jul 28 (return to Paris). Last value 27 ng/mL (insufficient, Dec 2025). Stress-fracture risk ~2× elevated below 40 ng/mL at 103+ kg.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain lasting >24h after Run #16 (8 km)
markers_to_watch.reason: Longest run of comeback at 103+ kg; tissue tolerance is the bottleneck. 48h window ends Fri evening.
Currently 1.48 after Run #16 spike. Should normalize as the load ages out of the acute window.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Drop below 32 ms or 3+ consecutive UNBALANCED days
markers_to_watch.reason: Stable at 35 ms. Two UNBALANCED days Jul 13-14 suggest system near absorption limit.
